name: reviews-reputation-review-response-orchestrator
description: T172 ReviewResponseOrchestrator — ORCHESTRATION archetype. Ownership check before SETNX. revision_allowed:true only for content_policy. NEW_KEY_VARIANT revision strategy. Does NOT emit reputation.updated.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: ownership-check-before-setnx, revision-allowed-content-policy-only, no-reputation-update-from-response
Retrieve ORCHESTRATION arch pattern for T172: conditional-revision-gate-001
Break T172 into: ownership(1) → SETNX(2) → content-moderation(3) → audit(4) → storeDocument+notify(5). revision_allowed conditional on rejection reason.
Generate review-response-orchestrator.service.ts — ownership check first, SETNX dedup, conditional revision_allowed (content_policy only), NEW_KEY_VARIANT for revision slot.
Named check validation: revision_allowed_content_policy_only, ownership_check_before_setnx, response_store_before_enqueue, no_reputation_update_from_response
Score generated code 0-100 against T172 iron rules: ownership order, conditional revision_allowed, no reputation.updated emission
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=conditional-revision-by-reason (content_policy only), rejected=always-revision-allowed-true. curriculumTier=3.
